concerns.detail: Full name and institution of a student (not professor) explicitly identified, violating privacy
concerns.excerpt: Yufei Ding (PKU) 不是只放prof吗怎么学生也开出来了.. 注意这不是丁老师，是同名学生

concerns.detail: Unsupported accusation that commenter is fabricating rumors alone, with mocking emoji
concerns.excerpt: 拿着一堆谣言在这里闹麻了🤣一个人编那么多条很累吧

concerns.detail: Derogatory slurs comparing students to mythical femme fatale (妲己) and vermin (蛇鼠一窝)
concerns.excerpt: 建议给这个妲 己的stf导师发邮件举报：https://web.stanford.edu/~bohg/ jeanette也是神人，怎么看上这姐们的 热知识，妲 己不会亲自承认是学术妲 己

concerns.detail: Substantive criticism about advisor Emory Liang Zhao regarding academic misconduct (AI-generated papers) removed
concerns.excerpt:
Emory Liang Zhao
听说有瓜 打个窝
和学生用ai写预印本的水文王，学生网上找车队拼车写一堆垃圾preprint刷文章数和互引

concerns.detail: Mass deletion of entries for multiple advisors (Tsinghua Yang Yuan, Yan Wang, SJTU Yong-lu Li, ZJU Yi Yang, Kui Ren, etc.) containing specific misconduct allegations

Tsinghua, Yang Yuan
